course.title: Side by Side 1-4 合集
course.author: Steven J. Molinsky & Bill Bliss
course.description: Side by Side 全套四册，共200课，全部内容唯一

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Hello! I'm Tom
lessons.text_en:
Hello! I'm Tom.
Hi, Tom. I'm Mary.
Nice to meet you, Mary.
Nice to meet you, too.
lessons.text_zh:
汤姆：你好！我是汤姆。
玛丽：嗨，汤姆。我是玛丽。
汤姆：很高兴认识你，玛丽。
玛丽：我也很高兴认识你。

lessons.title: Lesson 2: What's Your Name?
lessons.text_en:
What's your name?
My name is John.
Where are you from?
I'm from Canada.
Are you a student?
Yes, I am.
lessons.text_zh:
老师：你叫什么名字？
学生：我叫约翰。
老师：你从哪里来？
学生：我来自加拿大。
老师：你是学生吗？
学生：是的。

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Is This Your Book?
lessons.text_en:
Is this your book?
No, it isn't. It's her book.
Is that his pen?
Yes, it is.
Are these your keys?
Yes, they are.
lessons.text_zh:
A：这是你的书吗？
B：不，不是。这是她的书。
A：那是他的笔吗？
B：是的。
A：这些是你的钥匙吗？
B：是的。

lessons.title: Lesson 4: I'm a Doctor
lessons.text_en:
What do you do?
I'm a doctor. I work in a hospital.
What does she do?
She's a teacher. She works in a school.
What do they do?
They're engineers. They work in an office.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你是做什么的？
B：我是医生。我在医院工作。
A：她是做什么的？
B：她是老师。她在学校工作。
A：他们是做什么的？
B：他们是工程师。他们在办公室工作。

lessons.title: Lesson 5: I'm Reading a Book
lessons.text_en:
What are you doing?
I'm reading a book.
What is he doing?
He's watching TV.
What are they doing?
They're playing soccer.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你在做什么？
B：我在看书。
A：他在做什么？
B：他在看电视。
A：他们在做什么？
B：他们在踢足球。

lessons.title: Lesson 6: I Get Up at Seven
lessons.text_en:
What time do you get up?
I get up at seven o'clock.
What time does he eat breakfast?
He eats breakfast at eight.
What time do they go to bed?
They go to bed at ten.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你几点起床？
B：我七点起床。
A：他几点吃早餐？
B：他八点吃早餐。
A：他们几点睡觉？
B：他们十点睡觉。

lessons.title: Lesson 7: I Like Pizza
lessons.text_en:
Do you like pizza?
Yes, I do. I like pizza very much.
Does she like coffee?
No, she doesn't. She likes tea.
Do they like ice cream?
Yes, they do.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你喜欢披萨吗？
B：是的，我喜欢。我非常喜欢披萨。
A：她喜欢咖啡吗？
B：不，她不喜欢。她喜欢茶。
A：他们喜欢冰淇淋吗？
B：是的，他们喜欢。

lessons.title: Lesson 8: There's a Book on the Table
lessons.text_en:
What's on the table?
There's a book on the table.
What's in the kitchen?
There's a refrigerator and a stove.
How many chairs are there?
There are four chairs.
lessons.text_zh:
A：桌子上有什么？
B：桌子上有一本书。
A：厨房里有什么？
B：有一台冰箱和一个炉子。
A：有多少把椅子？
B：有四把椅子。

lessons.title: Lesson 9: I Can Swim
lessons.text_en:
Can you swim?
Yes, I can. I can swim very well.
Can he play the guitar?
No, he can't. But he can sing.
Can they speak French?
Yes, they can.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你会游泳吗？
B：是的，我会。我游得很好。
A：他会弹吉他吗？
B：不，他不会。但他会唱歌。
A：他们会说法语吗？
B：是的，他们会。

lessons.title: Lesson 10: I Have Two Brothers
lessons.text_en:
Do you have any brothers or sisters?
Yes, I have two brothers and one sister.
How old is your sister?
She's ten years old.
Does your brother have a car?
No, he doesn't. He has a bicycle.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你有兄弟姐妹吗？
B：是的，我有两个兄弟和一个妹妹。
A：你妹妹多大了？
B：她十岁。
A：你哥哥有车吗？
B：不，他没有。他有一辆自行车。

lessons.title: Lesson 11: I'm Going to the Store
lessons.text_en:
Where are you going?
I'm going to the store.
What are you going to buy?
I'm going to buy some milk.
When are you coming back?
I'm coming back soon.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你要去哪里？
B：我要去商店。
A：你要买什么？
B：我要买一些牛奶。
A：你什么时候回来？
B：我很快就回来。

lessons.title: Lesson 12: I Want to Be a Pilot
lessons.text_en:
What do you want to be?
I want to be a pilot.
Why do you want to be a pilot?
Because I want to travel around the world.
What does she want to be?
She wants to be a doctor.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你想成为什么？
B：我想成为飞行员。
A：你为什么想成为飞行员？
B：因为我想环游世界。
A：她想成为什么？
B：她想成为医生。

lessons.title: Lesson 13: I Went to the Beach Yesterday
lessons.text_en:
What did you do yesterday?
I went to the beach.
Did you have fun?
Yes, I did. I swam in the ocean.
Did she go with you?
No, she didn't. She stayed home.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你昨天做了什么？
B：我去了海滩。
A：你玩得开心吗？
B：是的。我在海里游泳了。
A：她和你一起去吗？
B：不，她没有。她待在家里。

lessons.title: Lesson 14: My House Has Three Rooms
lessons.text_en:
How many rooms does your house have?
It has three rooms: a living room, a bedroom, and a kitchen.
Is there a bathroom?
Yes, there is a bathroom near the bedroom.
Does your house have a garden?
Yes, there is a small garden in front.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你的房子有几个房间？
B：有三个房间：客厅、卧室和厨房。
A：有浴室吗？
B：有的，卧室旁边有一个浴室。
A：你的房子有花园吗？
B：有的，前面有一个小花园。

lessons.title: Lesson 15: What Color Is Your Car?
lessons.text_en:
What color is your car?
It's red.
What color are her eyes?
They're blue.
Is this your green shirt?
No, my shirt is white.
Do you like my yellow dress?
Yes, it's beautiful!
lessons.text_zh:
A：你的车是什么颜色？
B：是红色的。
A：她的眼睛是什么颜色？
B：是蓝色的。
A：这是你的绿色衬衫吗？
B：不，我的衬衫是白色的。
A：你喜欢我的黄色连衣裙吗？
B：是的，很漂亮！

lessons.title: Lesson 16: I'm Wearing a Jacket
lessons.text_en:
What are you wearing today?
I'm wearing a jacket and pants.
Is she wearing a hat?
Yes, she's wearing a blue hat.
What are they wearing?
They're wearing uniforms.
He looks nice in that suit.
Yes, it fits him well.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你今天穿什么？
B：我穿着夹克和裤子。
A：她戴帽子吗？
B：是的，她戴着一顶蓝帽子。
A：他们穿什么？
B：他们穿着制服。
A：他穿那套西装很好看。
B：是的，很合身。

lessons.title: Lesson 17: It's Cold Outside
lessons.text_en:
What's the weather like?
It's cold outside. It's snowing.
Is it hot in the summer?
Yes, it's very hot.
Does it rain a lot here?
Yes, it rains a lot in the spring.
What about autumn?
Autumn is cool and beautiful.
lessons.text_zh:
A：天气怎么样？
B：外面很冷。正在下雪。
A：夏天热吗？
B：是的，很热。
A：这里经常下雨吗？
B：是的，春天经常下雨。
A：秋天呢？
B：秋天凉爽又美丽。

lessons.title: Lesson 18: I Take the Bus to School
lessons.text_en:
How do you go to school?
I take the bus.
How does he go to work?
He drives his car.
How long does it take?
It takes about thirty minutes.
Do you like taking the bus?
Yes, I can read on the bus.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你怎么去学校？
B：我坐公交车。
A：他怎么去上班？
B：他开自己的车。
A：需要多长时间？
B：大约需要三十分钟。
A：你喜欢坐公交车吗？
B：是的，我可以在车上看书。

lessons.title: Lesson 19: She Is a Friendly Person
lessons.text_en:
What is your sister like?
She is very friendly and kind.
Is she tall?
Yes, she is tall with long hair.
Does she like sports?
Yes, she plays tennis every weekend.
She sounds like a wonderful person.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你妹妹是什么样的人？
B：她非常友好和善良。
A：她个子高吗？
B：是的，她个子高，长头发。
A：她喜欢运动吗？
B：是的，她每个周末都打网球。
A：她听起来是个很棒的人。

lessons.title: Lesson 20: I'm Hungry
lessons.text_en:
Are you hungry?
Yes, I'm very hungry.
Would you like a sandwich?
Yes, please. Thank you.
Here you are.
This is delicious!
lessons.text_zh:
A：你饿了吗？
B：是的，我很饿。
A：你想要一个三明治吗？
B：好的，谢谢。
A：给你。
B：真好吃！

lessons.title: Lesson 21: My Pet Cat
lessons.text_en:
Do you have a pet?
Yes, I have a cat. Her name is Luna.
What does she look like?
She is black and white with green eyes.
Does she like to play?
Yes, she loves to chase toys.
Cats are wonderful companions.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你有宠物吗？
B：是的，我有一只猫。她叫露娜。
A：她长什么样？
B：她是黑白相间的，有绿色的眼睛。
A：她喜欢玩吗？
B：是的，她喜欢追玩具。
A：猫是很棒的伙伴。

lessons.title: Lesson 22: I Need to Buy Fruit
lessons.text_en:
What do you need from the market?
I need some fruit.
What kind of fruit do you want?
I want apples, oranges, and bananas.
How many apples?
Six apples, please.
I'll come with you to the market.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你需要从市场买什么？
B：我需要一些水果。
A：你想要什么水果？
B：我想要苹果、橙子和香蕉。
A：多少个苹果？
B：六个苹果。
A：我跟你一起去市场。

lessons.title: Lesson 23: I'm Tired
lessons.text_en:
You look tired.
Yes, I am very tired.
Did you sleep well last night?
No, I only slept for four hours.
You should rest.
I will go to bed early tonight.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你看起来很累。
B：是的，我很累。
A：你昨晚睡得好吗？
B：不好，我只睡了四个小时。
A：你应该休息一下。
B：我今晚要早点睡觉。

lessons.title: Lesson 24: Where Is the Bathroom?
lessons.text_en:
Excuse me, where is the bathroom?
It's down the hall on the left.
Is it near the kitchen?
No, it's between the bedroom and the office.
Thank you.
You're welcome.
lessons.text_zh:
A：打扰一下，洗手间在哪里？
B：在走廊尽头左边。
A：在厨房附近吗？
B：不，在卧室和办公室之间。
A：谢谢。
B：不客气。

lessons.title: Lesson 25: Let's Play Together
lessons.text_en:
What do you want to do today?
Let's play basketball.
Good idea! Where should we play?
Let's go to the park.
Do you have a basketball?
Yes, I have one. Let's go!
lessons.text_zh:
A：你今天想做什么？
B：我们打篮球吧。
A：好主意！我们去哪里打？
B：我们去公园吧。
A：你有篮球吗？
B：是的，我有一个。我们走吧！

lessons.title: Lesson 26: My Father Is a Chef
lessons.text_en:
What does your father do?
My father is a chef. He works in a big restaurant.
Does he cook at home too?
Yes, he cooks dinner for us on Sundays.
What is his specialty?
He makes the best pasta in town!
lessons.text_zh:
A：你父亲是做什么的？
B：我父亲是厨师。他在一家大餐厅工作。
A：他在家也做饭吗？
B：是的，他星期天给我们做晚饭。
A：他的拿手菜是什么？
B：他做城里最好的意大利面！

lessons.title: Lesson 27: It's Time for Class
lessons.text_en:
Good morning, class!
Good morning, teacher!
Please open your books to page ten.
I forgot my book today.
You can share with your classmate.
Thank you, teacher.
lessons.text_zh:
老师：早上好，同学们！
学生：早上好，老师！
老师：请打开书本第十页。
学生：我今天忘带书了。
老师：你可以和同学共用。
学生：谢谢老师。

lessons.title: Lesson 28: I'm Happy Today
lessons.text_en:
Why are you so happy today?
I passed my English test!
Congratulations! I knew you could do it.
I studied very hard for it.
Your hard work paid off.
Let's celebrate! I'll buy you lunch.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你今天为什么这么开心？
B：我通过了英语考试！
A：恭喜你！我就知道你能行。
B：我为此非常努力学习了。
A：你的努力得到了回报。
B：我们来庆祝吧！我请你吃午饭。

lessons.title: Lesson 29: I Don't Like Spicy Food
lessons.text_en:
Do you like spicy food?
No, I don't. It's too hot for me.
What kind of food do you like?
I like mild and sweet dishes.
Do you like sushi?
Yes, I love it. It's fresh and healthy.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你喜欢辣的食物吗？
B：不，我不喜欢。对我来说太辣了。
A：你喜欢什么类型的食物？
B：我喜欢清淡和甜的食物。
A：你喜欢寿司吗？
B：是的，我喜欢。新鲜又健康。

lessons.title: Lesson 30: My School Is Big
lessons.text_en:
Tell me about your school.
My school is very big. It has fifty classrooms.
Is there a library?
Yes, there is a big library with many books.
Do you have a playground?
Yes, we have a large playground for sports.
lessons.text_zh:
A：给我说说你的学校。
B：我的学校很大。有五十间教室。
A：有图书馆吗？
B：是的，有一个很大的图书馆，有很多书。
A：你们有操场吗？
B：是的，我们有一个很大的运动操场。

lessons.title: Lesson 31: I Help My Mother
lessons.text_en:
Do you help at home?
Yes, I help my mother with cleaning.
What do you clean?
I clean the kitchen and my bedroom.
Does your brother help too?
Yes, he washes the dishes after dinner.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你在家帮忙做家务吗？
B：是的，我帮妈妈打扫。
A：你打扫什么？
B：我打扫厨房和我的卧室。
A：你弟弟也帮忙吗？
B：是的，他晚饭后洗碗。

lessons.title: Lesson 32: I'm Learning English
lessons.text_en:
What language are you learning?
I'm learning English.
Is it difficult?
Sometimes, but I practice every day.
How do you practice?
I watch movies and listen to songs in English.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你在学什么语言？
B：我在学英语。
A：难吗？
B：有时候，但我每天练习。
A：你怎么练习？
B：我看英文电影和听英文歌。

lessons.title: Lesson 33: I Like Summer Best
lessons.text_en:
Which season do you like best?
I like summer best.
Why do you like summer?
Because I can go swimming and eat ice cream.
I like winter because of the snow.
We can enjoy different things in each season.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你最喜欢哪个季节？
B：我最喜欢夏天。
A：你为什么喜欢夏天？
B：因为我可以去游泳和吃冰淇淋。
A：我喜欢冬天因为有雪。
B：每个季节都有不同的乐趣。

lessons.title: Lesson 34: My Birthday Is in June
lessons.text_en:
When is your birthday?
My birthday is in June.
How old will you be?
I will be twenty years old.
Do you want to have a party?
Yes, I want to invite all my friends.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你的生日是什么时候？
B：我的生日在六月。
A：你多大了？
B：我二十岁了。
A：你想开派对吗？
B：是的，我想邀请所有的朋友。

lessons.title: Lesson 35: Let's Go to the Zoo
lessons.text_en:
Let's go to the zoo this Saturday!
That's a great idea. I love animals.
What animals do you want to see?
I want to see the lions and monkeys.
The zoo opens at nine o'clock.
Let's meet at the entrance at nine thirty.
lessons.text_zh:
A：这个星期六我们去动物园吧！
B：好主意。我喜欢动物。
A：你想看什么动物？
B：我想看狮子和猴子。
A：动物园九点开门。
B：我们九点半在入口见。

lessons.title: Lesson 36: I Get Dressed at Seven
lessons.text_en:
What time do you get dressed?
I get dressed at seven in the morning.
What do you wear to school?
I wear a shirt and pants.
Do you wear a uniform?
No, we don't have uniforms at my school.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你几点穿衣服？
B：我早上七点穿衣服。
A：你穿什么去学校？
B：我穿衬衫和裤子。
A：你穿校服吗？
B：不，我们学校没有校服。

lessons.title: Lesson 37: I Can Run Fast
lessons.text_en:
Can you run fast?
Yes, I can. I'm the fastest in my class.
Can you jump high?
Not very high, but I can jump far.
Do you like sports day?
Yes, I always win in the running race.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你跑得快吗？
B：是的，我是班上最快的。
A：你跳得高吗？
B：不是很高，但我跳得远。
A：你喜欢运动会吗？
B：是的，我总是在跑步比赛中赢。

lessons.title: Lesson 38: I Need a New Phone
lessons.text_en:
What do you need?
I need a new phone. My old one is broken.
What kind of phone do you want?
I want a smartphone with a good camera.
How much is it?
It costs around five hundred dollars.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你需要什么？
B：我需要一个新手机。我的旧手机坏了。
A：你想要什么样的手机？
B：我想要一个相机好的智能手机。
A：多少钱？
B：大概五百美元。

lessons.title: Lesson 39: Let's Watch a Movie
lessons.text_en:
Do you want to watch a movie tonight?
Yes, I'd love to.
What kind of movies do you like?
I like comedy and action movies.
There's a new comedy at the cinema.
Let's go see it!
lessons.text_zh:
A：你今晚想看电影吗？
B：是的，我很想看。
A：你喜欢什么类型的电影？
B：我喜欢喜剧片和动作片。
A：电影院在上映一部新喜剧。
B：我们去看吧！

lessons.title: Lesson 40: She Has Beautiful Eyes
lessons.text_en:
What does your girlfriend look like?
She has beautiful blue eyes and long brown hair.
Is she tall?
She is average height.
Does she wear glasses?
No, she has perfect vision.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你的女朋友长什么样？
B：她有美丽的蓝眼睛和长长的棕色头发。
A：她个子高吗？
B：她中等身材。
A：她戴眼镜吗？
B：不，她视力很好。

lessons.title: Lesson 41: I Like to Draw
lessons.text_en:
What is your hobby?
I like to draw and paint.
What do you like to draw?
I draw landscapes and animals.
Can you show me your drawings?
Sure! I have a sketchbook with me.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你的爱好是什么？
B：我喜欢画画。
A：你喜欢画什么？
B：我画风景和动物。
A：能给我看看你的画吗？
B：当然！我随身带着速写本。

lessons.title: Lesson 42: The Food Is Great Here
lessons.text_en:
This restaurant is very nice.
Yes, the food is great here.
What did you order?
I ordered grilled fish with vegetables.
How does it taste?
It's delicious! Would you like to try some?
lessons.text_zh:
A：这家餐厅很好。
B：是的，这里的食物很棒。
A：你点了什么？
B：我点了烤鱼配蔬菜。
A：味道怎么样？
B：很美味！你想尝尝吗？

lessons.title: Lesson 43: I'm Saving Money
lessons.text_en:
What are you saving money for?
I'm saving money to buy a new laptop.
How much do you need?
I need about eight hundred dollars.
How much have you saved so far?
I have saved three hundred dollars already.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你存钱是为了什么？
B：我在存钱买一台新笔记本电脑。
A：你需要多少钱？
B：我需要大约八百美元。
A：你至今存了多少了？
B：我已经存了三百美元了。

lessons.title: Lesson 44: I'm from Mexico
lessons.text_en:
Where are you from?
I'm from Mexico.
What is Mexico like?
It's a beautiful country with great food.
What food is famous in Mexico?
Tacos and burritos are very popular.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你从哪里来？
B：我来自墨西哥。
A：墨西哥怎么样？
B：那是一个美丽的国家，有很棒的食物。
A：墨西哥什么食物最有名？
B：墨西哥卷饼和玉米煎饼很受欢迎。

lessons.title: Lesson 45: I'm Good at Math
lessons.text_en:
What subject are you good at?
I'm good at math.
Do you like numbers?
Yes, I enjoy solving problems.
Are you good at science too?
Yes, science is my second favorite subject.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你擅长什么科目？
B：我擅长数学。
A：你喜欢数字吗？
B：是的，我喜欢解题。
A：你也擅长科学吗？
B：是的，科学是我第二喜欢的科目。

lessons.title: Lesson 46: I'm Afraid of Snakes
lessons.text_en:
What are you afraid of?
I'm afraid of snakes.
Are you afraid of spiders too?
No, spiders don't scare me.
What about the dark?
I'm not afraid of the dark, but I don't like it.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你害怕什么？
B：我怕蛇。
A：你也怕蜘蛛吗？
B：不，蜘蛛吓不到我。
A：黑暗呢？
B：我不怕黑暗，但我不喜欢。

lessons.title: Lesson 47: Let's Take a Walk
lessons.text_en:
The weather is beautiful today.
Yes, let's take a walk in the park.
That sounds lovely.
We can see the flowers and trees.
Look at those birds!
They are singing beautifully.
lessons.text_zh:
A：今天天气真好。
B：是的，我们去公园散步吧。
A：听起来不错。
B：我们可以看看花和树。
A：看那些鸟！
B：它们唱得很好听。

lessons.title: Lesson 48: I Brush My Teeth Every Night
lessons.text_en:
What do you do before bed?
I brush my teeth and wash my face.
Do you read before sleeping?
Yes, I read for about fifteen minutes.
That's a good habit.
It helps me relax and sleep better.
lessons.text_zh:
A：睡觉前你做什么？
B：我刷牙洗脸。
A：你睡前看书吗？
B：是的，我看大约十五分钟的书。
A：那是个好习惯。
B：这帮助我放松，睡得更好。

lessons.title: Lesson 49: I Want a Glass of Water
lessons.text_en:
Can I have a glass of water, please?
Sure, here you go. Would you like ice?
Yes, please. It's very hot today.
Here is your water with ice.
Thank you very much.
You're welcome. Let me know if you need anything else.
lessons.text_zh:
A：请给我一杯水好吗？
B：当然，给你。要加冰吗？
A：好的，请加冰。今天太热了。
B：这是你的冰水。
A：非常感谢。
B：不客气。有需要再叫我。

lessons.title: Lesson 50: See You Tomorrow!
lessons.text_en:
It's getting late. I have to go home now.
OK. Thank you for a wonderful day.
Let's meet again tomorrow.
Sure. Same time, same place?
Yes! See you tomorrow!
Goodbye! Take care!
lessons.text_zh:
A：不早了。我现在得回家了。
B：好的。谢谢你陪我度过了美好的一天。
A：我们明天再见面吧。
B：好的。同一时间，同一地点？
A：好的！明天见！
B：再见！保重！

lessons.title: Lesson 1: I Didn't Watch TV Last Night
lessons.text_en:
Did you watch TV last night?
No, I didn't. I studied for my test.
What time did you go to bed?
I went to bed at eleven.
Did your brother watch TV?
Yes, he watched a movie.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你昨晚看电视了吗？
B：不，没看。我复习考试了。
A：你几点去睡觉的？
B：我十一点睡的。
A：你弟弟看电视了吗？
B：是的，他看了一部电影。

lessons.title: Lesson 2: I'm Going to Travel
lessons.text_en:
What are you going to do this weekend?
I'm going to travel to Chicago.
How are you going to get there?
I'm going to fly.
How long are you going to stay?
I'm going to stay for three days.
lessons.text_zh:
A：这个周末你打算做什么？
B：我打算去芝加哥旅行。
A：你打算怎么去？
B：我打算坐飞机去。
A：你打算待多久？
B：我打算待三天。

lessons.title: Lesson 3: I Was Born in 1995
lessons.text_en:
When were you born?
I was born in 1995.
Where were you born?
I was born in Boston.
Were your parents born there too?
No, they were born in New York.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你什么时候出生的？
B：我1995年出生。
A：你在哪里出生的？
B：我在波士顿出生。
A：你的父母也在那里出生吗？
B：不，他们在纽约出生。

lessons.title: Lesson 4: I've Already Eaten
lessons.text_en:
Have you eaten lunch yet?
Yes, I've already eaten.
Has Mary called yet?
No, she hasn't called yet.
Have they finished their homework?
Yes, they've just finished.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你吃午饭了吗？
B：是的，我已经吃了。
A：玛丽打电话了吗？
B：不，她还没打。
A：他们完成作业了吗？
B：是的，他们刚完成。

lessons.title: Lesson 5: I Should Exercise More
lessons.text_en:
You should exercise more.
I know. I should go to the gym.
You shouldn't eat so much junk food.
You're right. I should eat healthier.
We should all take better care of ourselves.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你应该多运动。
B：我知道。我应该去健身房。
A：你不应该吃那么多垃圾食品。
B：你说得对。我应该吃得更健康。
A：我们都应该更好地照顾自己。

lessons.title: Lesson 6: If It Rains, I'll Stay Home
lessons.text_en:
What will you do if it rains?
If it rains, I'll stay home.
If it's sunny, will you go to the beach?
Yes, I will. If it's sunny, I'll go swimming.
What will you do if you're tired?
If I'm tired, I'll take a nap.
lessons.text_zh:
A：如果下雨你会做什么？
B：如果下雨，我就待在家里。
A：如果天晴，你会去海滩吗？
B：是的。如果天晴，我会去游泳。
A：如果你累了你会做什么？
B：如果我累了，我就小睡一会儿。

lessons.title: Lesson 7: The Book That I Read
lessons.text_en:
Did you like the book that you read?
Yes, I loved it. It was very interesting.
What's the name of the movie that you saw?
It's called 'The Last Adventure'.
Is that the restaurant that has great pizza?
Yes, it is.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你喜欢你读的那本书吗？
B：是的，我很喜欢。非常有趣。
A：你看的那部电影叫什么名字？
B：叫'最后的冒险'。
A：那是那家披萨很好吃的餐厅吗？
B：是的。

lessons.title: Lesson 8: He Told Me to Wait
lessons.text_en:
What did he tell you?
He told me to wait for him.
What did she ask you to do?
She asked me to help her.
Did they invite you to the party?
Yes, they invited me to come.
lessons.text_zh:
A：他告诉了你什么？
B：他让我等他。
A：她让你做什么？
B：她让我帮她。
A：他们邀请你去派对了吗？
B：是的，他们邀请我去。

lessons.title: Lesson 9: I Used to Live in Chicago
lessons.text_en:
Where did you use to live?
I used to live in Chicago.
Did you use to play the piano?
Yes, I used to play when I was younger.
Didn't she use to be a teacher?
Yes, she used to teach math.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你以前住在哪里？
B：我以前住在芝加哥。
A：你以前弹钢琴吗？
B：是的，我年轻时弹过。
A：她以前不是老师吗？
B：是的，她以前教数学。

lessons.title: Lesson 10: I Wish I Could Fly
lessons.text_en:
I wish I could fly like a bird.
That would be amazing! I wish I had wings too.
I wish I lived on a beautiful island.
I wish I could visit you there.
I wish I were taller.
I think you're the perfect height.
lessons.text_zh:
A：我希望我能像鸟一样飞翔。
B：那太棒了！我也希望我有翅膀。
A：我希望我住在一个美丽的小岛上。
B：我希望我能去那里看你。
A：我希望我更高一些。
B：我觉得你的身高正好。

lessons.title: Lesson 11: She Is Taller Than Me
lessons.text_en:
Who is taller, you or your sister?
My sister is taller than me.
Is she older than you too?
No, I'm older but she is taller.
That's funny. Is she also smarter?
She thinks she is!
lessons.text_zh:
A：谁更高，你还是你妹妹？
B：我妹妹比我高。
A：她也比你大吗？
B：不，我比她大，但她更高。
A：真有趣。她也更聪明吗？
B：她觉得自己是！

lessons.title: Lesson 12: I Had to Work Late
lessons.text_en:
Why were you late yesterday?
I had to work late.
Did you have to finish a report?
Yes, my boss needed it by this morning.
That sounds stressful.
It was, but I got it done.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你昨天为什么迟到？
B：我必须加班。
A：你必须完成一份报告吗？
B：是的，老板今天早上要。
A：听起来压力很大。
B：是的，但我完成了。

lessons.title: Lesson 13: I've Never Been to Asia
lessons.text_en:
Have you ever been to Asia?
No, I've never been to Asia.
Have you been to Europe?
Yes, I've been to France and Italy.
Which country did you like better?
Italy. The food was amazing.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你去过亚洲吗？
B：不，我从没去过亚洲。
A：你去过欧洲吗？
B：是的，我去过法国和意大利。
A：你更喜欢哪个国家？
B：意大利。食物太棒了。

lessons.title: Lesson 14: I'm the Tallest in My Family
lessons.text_en:
Are you tall in your family?
Yes, I'm the tallest.
Who is the shortest?
My little brother is the shortest.
Is your father tall?
He is, but I'm still taller than him!
lessons.text_zh:
A：你在家里个子高吗？
B：是的，我是最高的。
A：谁是最矮的？
B：我的小弟弟是最矮的。
A：你父亲高吗？
B：他高，但我还是比他高！

lessons.title: Lesson 15: I Like Jazz More Than Rock
lessons.text_en:
Do you like jazz music?
Yes, I like it more than rock.
Which do you like best, jazz or classical?
I like classical the best. It's very relaxing.
Do you play any instruments?
I play the violin.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你喜欢爵士乐吗？
B：是的，我喜欢爵士乐超过摇滚。
A：你最喜欢哪个，爵士还是古典？
B：我最喜欢古典音乐。它很放松。
A：你会演奏乐器吗？
B：我会拉小提琴。

lessons.title: Lesson 16: I Will Call You Tonight
lessons.text_en:
What time will you call me tonight?
I will call you around eight.
Will you finish work before that?
I think I will finish at seven.
OK, I'll be waiting for your call.
Great, talk to you then!
lessons.text_zh:
A：你今晚几点给我打电话？
B：我八点左右打给你。
A：那之前你能下班吗？
B：我想我七点能下班。
A：好的，我等你的电话。
B：好的，到时候聊！

lessons.title: Lesson 17: I Couldn't Find My Keys
lessons.text_en:
Why were you late this morning?
I couldn't find my keys.
Where did you look?
I looked everywhere — in the kitchen, in the bedroom.
Where did you finally find them?
They were in my jacket pocket!
lessons.text_zh:
A：你今天早上为什么迟到？
B：我找不到钥匙了。
A：你找了哪些地方？
B：我到处找了——厨房、卧室。
A：最后在哪里找到的？
B：在我的夹克口袋里！

lessons.title: Lesson 18: I Might Go to the Party
lessons.text_en:
Will you go to the party tonight?
I might go, but I'm not sure.
Why aren't you sure?
I might have to work late.
Let me know if you can come.
I'll text you when I know.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你今晚去派对吗？
B：我可能去，但还不确定。
A：为什么不确定？
B：我可能得加班。
A：如果你能来就告诉我。
B：我知道了就给你发短信。

lessons.title: Lesson 19: I've Been Waiting Since 3 PM
lessons.text_en:
How long have you been waiting?
I've been waiting since 3 PM.
That's more than an hour! I'm sorry.
That's OK. I was reading a magazine.
I should have called you.
Don't worry about it.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你等了多久了？
B：我从下午三点就在等了。
A：那超过一个小时了！对不起。
B：没关系。我刚才在看杂志。
A：我应该给你打电话的。
B：别担心。

lessons.title: Lesson 20: I Don't Have to Go to Work Tomorrow
lessons.text_en:
Do you have to go to work tomorrow?
No, I don't have to. It's a holiday.
That's nice! What are you going to do?
I'm going to sleep in and then go out for brunch.
Sounds like a perfect day!
Yes, I'm really looking forward to it.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你明天必须去上班吗？
B：不，不用。明天是假日。
A：那太好了！你打算做什么？
B：我要睡个懒觉，然后出去吃早午餐。
A：听起来是完美的一天！
B：是的，我真的很期待。

lessons.title: Lesson 21: My Car Is Faster Than Yours
lessons.text_en:
How fast is your new car?
It's very fast. Faster than yours!
Really? How fast can it go?
It can go up to 200 kilometers per hour.
That's impressive. Is it expensive?
It was, but it was worth it.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你的新车有多快？
B：非常快。比你的快！
A：真的吗？它能跑多快？
B：能跑到每小时200公里。
A：真厉害。贵吗？
B：贵，但物有所值。

lessons.title: Lesson 22: I've Known Her for Ten Years
lessons.text_en:
How long have you known Sarah?
I've known her for ten years.
That's a long time! How did you meet?
We met in college. We were roommates.
Are you still close?
Yes, she's my best friend.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你认识萨拉多久了？
B：我认识她十年了。
A：那真是一段很长的时间！你们怎么认识的？
B：我们在大学认识的。我们是室友。
A：你们还亲近吗？
B：是的，她是我最好的朋友。

lessons.title: Lesson 23: I Would Like a Cup of Tea
lessons.text_en:
What would you like to drink?
I would like a cup of tea, please.
With milk and sugar?
Just a little sugar, no milk.
Here you go. Enjoy!
Thank you. This is perfect.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你想喝什么？
B：请给我一杯茶。
A：加奶和糖吗？
B：只要一点糖，不要奶。
A：给你。请享用！
B：谢谢。这杯茶很好。

lessons.title: Lesson 24: I Left My Umbrella on the Bus
lessons.text_en:
What's wrong? You look upset.
I left my umbrella on the bus.
Did you try to call the bus company?
Yes, but nobody answered.
Maybe someone turned it in.
I hope so. It was a gift from my mother.
lessons.text_zh:
A：怎么了？你看起来很沮丧。
B：我把伞忘在公交车上了。
A：你试着给公交公司打电话了吗？
B：打了，但没人接。
A：也许有人交到失物招领处了。
B：希望如此。那是我妈妈送的礼物。

lessons.title: Lesson 25: They Were Playing Soccer at 5 PM
lessons.text_en:
What were they doing at 5 PM yesterday?
They were playing soccer in the park.
Were you playing too?
No, I was watching them.
Who won the game?
The blue team won. It was a close game.
lessons.text_zh:
A：昨天下午五点在做什么？
B：他们在公园里踢足球。
A：你也在踢吗？
B：不，我在看他们踢。
A：谁赢了比赛？
B：蓝队赢了。比赛很激烈。

lessons.title: Lesson 26: I Need to Buy a Present
lessons.text_en:
What are you looking for?
I need to buy a present for my mother.
Is it her birthday?
Yes, her birthday is next week.
What does she like?
She likes jewelry and perfume.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你在找什么？
B：我需要给我妈妈买礼物。
A：是她的生日吗？
B：是的，她下周生日。
A：她喜欢什么？
B：她喜欢珠宝和香水。

lessons.title: Lesson 27: It Was the Best Day of My Life
lessons.text_en:
How was your vacation?
It was the best day of my life!
What did you do?
I went snorkeling and saw sea turtles.
That sounds amazing!
It was unforgettable.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你的假期怎么样？
B：那是我生命中最美好的一天！
A：你做了什么？
B：我去浮潜了，看到了海龟。
A：听起来太棒了！
B：真是难忘。

lessons.title: Lesson 28: He Runs Faster Than Me
lessons.text_en:
Who runs faster, Tom or you?
Tom runs faster than me.
But you run longer, right?
Yes, I can run for an hour non-stop.
That's good endurance.
I practice every morning.
lessons.text_zh:
A：汤姆和你谁跑得更快？
B：汤姆比我跑得快。
A：但你跑得更久，对吧？
B：是的，我可以连续跑一个小时。
A：那耐力很好。
B：我每天早上都练习。

lessons.title: Lesson 29: I've Already Seen That Movie
lessons.text_en:
Do you want to watch this movie?
I've already seen it.
Really? When did you see it?
I saw it last month with my sister.
Was it good?
It was OK, not the best.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你想看这部电影吗？
B：我已经看过了。
A：真的吗？你什么时候看的？
B：我上个月和我妹妹一起看的。
A：好看吗？
B：还行，不是最好的。

lessons.title: Lesson 30: We Couldn't Find a Parking Spot
lessons.text_en:
Why were you late to the restaurant?
We couldn't find a parking spot.
Did you drive around for long?
Yes, for about twenty minutes.
Next time, we can take the subway.
That's a better idea.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你们为什么到餐厅晚了？
B：我们找不到停车位。
A：你们绕了很久吗？
B：是的，大约二十分钟。
A：下次我们可以坐地铁。
B：那样更好。

lessons.title: Lesson 31: I Will Always Remember You
lessons.text_en:
I'm moving to another city next month.
I will miss you a lot.
I will always remember our time together.
We can video call every weekend.
That would be great.
Your friendship means so much to me.
lessons.text_zh:
A：我下个月要搬到另一个城市了。
B：我会很想你的。
A：我会永远记得我们在一起的时光。
B：我们可以每个周末视频通话。
A：那太好了。
B：你的友谊对我意义重大。

lessons.title: Lesson 32: I Had Never Tried Sushi Before
lessons.text_en:
Have you ever tried sushi?
I had never tried it before last week.
Did you like it?
I loved it! I can't believe I waited so long.
What kind did you try?
Salmon and avocado rolls.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你吃过寿司吗？
B：上周之前我从没吃过。
A：你喜欢吗？
B：我非常喜欢！真不敢相信我等了这么久。
A：你吃了哪种？
B：三文鱼牛油果卷。

lessons.title: Lesson 33: I Must Finish This Today
lessons.text_en:
You look busy.
I am. I must finish this report today.
Is it urgent?
Yes, the client needs it by 5 PM.
Do you need any help?
No, but thanks for offering.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你看起来很忙。
B：是的。我今天必须完成这份报告。
A：很紧急吗？
B：是的，客户下午五点前要。
A：需要帮忙吗？
B：不用，但谢谢你的好意。

lessons.title: Lesson 34: He Is the Most Generous Person I Know
lessons.text_en:
What do you think of Mark?
He's the most generous person I know.
Why do you say that?
He always donates to charity and helps others.
That's a great quality.
Yes, I really admire him.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你觉得马克怎么样？
B：他是我认识的最慷慨的人。
A：你为什么这么说？
B：他总是捐款给慈善机构，帮助别人。
A：那是很好的品质。
B：是的，我很敬佩他。

lessons.title: Lesson 35: I Wouldn't Do That If I Were You
lessons.text_en:
I'm going to quit my job.
I wouldn't do that if I were you.
Why not?
You should find another job first.
That's good advice.
It's safer to have something lined up.
lessons.text_zh:
A：我打算辞职。
B：如果我是你，我不会那样做。
A：为什么不？
B：你应该先找到另一份工作。
A：好建议。
B：有备无患更安全。

lessons.title: Lesson 36: He Has Been Traveling for a Month
lessons.text_en:
Where is your brother?
He has been traveling in Europe for a month.
That sounds wonderful! Which countries?
He's visited five countries so far.
When will he come back?
Next week, I think.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你哥哥在哪里？
B：他已经在欧洲旅行了一个月。
A：听起来很棒！去了哪些国家？
B：他至今已经去了五个国家。
A：他什么时候回来？
B：我想下周。

lessons.title: Lesson 37: This Is the Worst Food I've Ever Had
lessons.text_en:
How is your meal?
This is the worst food I've ever had!
Really? What's wrong with it?
It's too salty and cold.
You should send it back.
I think I will.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你的饭菜怎么样？
B：这是我吃过的最难吃的食物！
A：真的吗？有什么问题？
B：太咸了，而且是凉的。
A：你应该退回去。
B：我想我会的。

lessons.title: Lesson 38: I'll Be There Soon
lessons.text_en:
Where are you? The movie is starting.
I'll be there soon. I'm almost at the cinema.
The trailers are playing now.
Don't wait for me, go inside.
OK, I'll save you a seat.
Thanks! I'll be there in five minutes.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你在哪里？电影要开始了。
B：我马上就到。我快到电影院了。
A：正在放预告片。
B：别等我，先进去吧。
A：好的，我给你留座位。
B：谢谢！我五分钟就到。

lessons.title: Lesson 39: I Should Have Studied Harder
lessons.text_en:
How did your exam go?
Not well. I should have studied harder.
Did you find it difficult?
Yes, I didn't prepare enough.
You can do better next time.
I'll definitely study more for the next one.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你考得怎么样？
B：不好。我本应该更努力学习的。
A：你觉得难吗？
B：是的，我准备得不够。
A：下次你可以做得更好。
B：下次我一定会多学习。

lessons.title: Lesson 40: I Used to Be Afraid of Heights
lessons.text_en:
Are you afraid of heights?
I used to be, but not anymore.
How did you overcome it?
I went rock climbing with a friend.
That took courage!
After that, I wasn't scared anymore.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你恐高吗？
B：我以前恐高，但现在不了。
A：你是怎么克服的？
B：我和一个朋友去攀岩了。
A：那需要勇气！
B：从那以后，我就不再害怕了。

lessons.title: Lesson 41: They Have Been Married for 20 Years
lessons.text_en:
How long have your parents been married?
They have been married for 20 years.
That's a long time. How did they meet?
They met at a friend's wedding.
That's romantic! Do they still love each other?
Yes, they are very happy together.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你父母结婚多久了？
B：他们已经结婚20年了。
A：那很长了。他们怎么认识的？
B：他们在朋友的婚礼上认识的。
A：真浪漫！他们还彼此相爱吗？
B：是的，他们在一起很幸福。

lessons.title: Lesson 42: I Don't Know How to Dance
lessons.text_en:
Do you know how to dance?
No, I don't know how.
Would you like to learn?
Yes, but I'm a little shy.
Don't be shy! I can teach you.
OK, let's try.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你会跳舞吗？
B：不，我不会。
A：你想学吗？
B：想，但我有点害羞。
A：别害羞！我可以教你。
B：好的，我们试试吧。

lessons.title: Lesson 43: She Could Speak Three Languages
lessons.text_en:
How many languages can your grandmother speak?
She could speak three languages.
That's impressive! Which ones?
English, French, and Spanish.
I wish I could speak that many.
She learned them by living in different countries.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你奶奶会说几种语言？
B：她会说三种语言。
A：真厉害！哪三种？
B：英语、法语和西班牙语。
A：我希望我也可以说多种语言。
B：她通过在各国生活学会的。

lessons.title: Lesson 44: I'll Take the Train Instead
lessons.text_en:
Are you driving to the meeting?
No, I'll take the train instead.
Why?
Traffic is terrible during rush hour.
How long does the train take?
About forty minutes.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你开车去开会吗？
B：不，我改坐火车。
A：为什么？
B：高峰时间交通太糟糕了。
A：火车需要多久？
B：大约四十分钟。

lessons.title: Lesson 45: I've Lost My Phone
lessons.text_en:
What's the matter?
I've lost my phone.
When did you last have it?
I had it at the coffee shop.
Let's go back and look for it.
I hope nobody stole it.
lessons.text_zh:
A：怎么了？
B：我的手机丢了。
A：你最后一次见到它是什么时候？
B：在咖啡店时我还在用。
A：我们回去找找看。
B：希望没人偷了它。

lessons.title: Lesson 46: The More You Read, the More You Know
lessons.text_en:
Why do you read so much?
The more you read, the more you know.
That's true. What do you like to read?
I enjoy history and science books.
Do you read every day?
Yes, I read for at least an hour.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你为什么读这么多书？
B：读得越多，知道得越多。
A：没错。你喜欢读什么？
B：我喜欢历史和科学书。
A：你每天都读吗？
B：是的，我至少读一小时。

lessons.title: Lesson 47: She Had Never Flown Before
lessons.text_en:
How was your sister's flight?
She was nervous. She had never flown before.
Did she enjoy it?
Yes, she loved looking at the clouds.
Was she scared during takeoff?
A little, but she got used to it.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你妹妹的飞行怎么样？
B：她很紧张。她以前从未坐过飞机。
A：她喜欢吗？
B：是的，她喜欢看云。
A：起飞时她害怕了吗？
B：有一点，但她习惯了。

lessons.title: Lesson 48: I May Have Left the Door Open
lessons.text_en:
Did you lock the door?
I think so, but I may have left it open.
You should check.
I'll go back and make sure.
Hurry! We don't want anyone to break in.
Don't worry, I'll be quick.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你锁门了吗？
B：我想锁了，但可能没关好。
A：你应该检查一下。
B：我回去确认一下。
A：快点！我们不想有人闯入。
B：别担心，我很快。

lessons.title: Lesson 49: If I Had More Time, I Would Travel
lessons.text_en:
If you had more time, what would you do?
If I had more time, I would travel the world.
Where would you go first?
I would visit Japan and South Korea.
That sounds like an amazing trip.
Someday I'll make it happen.
lessons.text_zh:
A：如果你有更多时间，你会做什么？
B：如果我有更多时间，我会环游世界。
A：你会先去哪里？
B：我会去日本和韩国。
A：听起来是一次很棒的旅行。
B：总有一天我会实现的。

lessons.title: Lesson 50: I've Learned a Lot This Year
lessons.text_en:
How was your year?
I've learned a lot this year.
What was the best thing you learned?
I learned how to be more patient.
That's a valuable lesson.
Yes, and I'm going to keep learning.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你这一年过得怎么样？
B：我今年学到了很多东西。
A：你学到的最好的是什么？
B：我学会了如何更有耐心。
A：那是有价值的一课。
B：是的，我会继续学习。

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Have You Ever Seen a Ghost?
lessons.text_en:
Have you ever seen a ghost?
No, I haven't. I don't believe in ghosts.
Have you ever been to a haunted house?
Yes, I have. It was scary!
What's the strangest thing you've ever seen?
I once saw a UFO!
lessons.text_zh:
A：你见过鬼吗？
B：不，没有。我不相信鬼。
A：你去过鬼屋吗？
B：是的，去过。很吓人！
A：你见过的最奇怪的东西是什么？
B：我一次看到过不明飞行物！

lessons.title: Lesson 2: English Is Spoken Here
lessons.text_en:
Is English spoken in your country?
Yes, English is spoken in many places.
Where is French spoken?
French is spoken in France and Canada.
Are these books written in Chinese?
Yes, they are written in Chinese.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你们国家说英语吗？
B：是的，很多地方说英语。
A：哪里说法语？
B：法国和加拿大说法语。
A：这些书是中文写的吗？
B：是的，它们是用中文写的。

lessons.title: Lesson 3: The House Was Built in 1920
lessons.text_en:
When was this house built?
It was built in 1920.
Who designed it?
It was designed by a famous architect.
Has it been renovated?
Yes, it was renovated last year.
lessons.text_zh:
A：这栋房子是什么时候建的？
B：建于1920年。
A：是谁设计的？
B：是由一位著名建筑师设计的。
A：它翻新了吗？
B：是的，去年翻新了。

lessons.title: Lesson 4: I Would Have Helped You
lessons.text_en:
If I had known, I would have helped you.
Thank you. That's very kind.
If you had called me, I would have come.
I'm sorry I didn't call you.
If she had studied harder, she would have passed.
I know. She regrets it now.
lessons.text_zh:
A：如果我当时知道，我就会帮你了。
B：谢谢。你真好。
A：如果你给我打电话，我就会来了。
B：对不起，我没有给你打电话。
A：如果她当时更努力学习，她就通过了。
B：我知道。她现在很后悔。

lessons.title: Lesson 5: He Said He Was Tired
lessons.text_en:
What did he say?
He said he was tired.
What did she tell you?
She told me that she would be late.
Did they say they were coming?
Yes, they said they would arrive at eight.
lessons.text_zh:
A：他说了什么？
B：他说他累了。
A：她告诉了你什么？
B：她告诉我她会迟到。
A：他们说了要来吗？
B：是的，他们说八点到。

lessons.title: Lesson 6: I Don't Know How to Fix It
lessons.text_en:
Do you know how to fix this?
No, I don't know how to do it.
Can you teach me how to cook?
Sure, I can show you how to make pasta.
I learned how to swim when I was young.
I never learned how to ride a bike.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你知道怎么修这个吗？
B：不，我不知道怎么做。
A：你能教我怎么做饭吗？
B：当然，我可以教你做意大利面。
A：我小时候学会了游泳。
B：我从来没学过骑自行车。

lessons.title: Lesson 7: I'm Looking Forward to It
lessons.text_en:
Are you looking forward to your trip?
Yes, I'm really looking forward to it.
I'm looking forward to meeting your family.
They're looking forward to meeting you too.
What are you most excited about?
I'm looking forward to seeing the museums.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你很期待你的旅行吗？
B：是的，我非常期待。
A：我期待着见到你的家人。
B：他们也期待着见到你。
A：你最期待什么？
B：我期待着看到博物馆。

lessons.title: Lesson 8: I'm Used to Getting Up Early
lessons.text_en:
You get up very early.
I know. I'm used to getting up early.
Aren't you used to the cold weather?
No, I'm not used to it yet.
Will you get used to it?
I think I will eventually.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你起得很早。
B：我知道。我习惯早起了。
A：你不习惯寒冷的天气吗？
B：不，我还不习惯。
A：你会习惯的。
B：我想最终会的。

lessons.title: Lesson 9: It's Too Heavy for Me
lessons.text_en:
Can you lift this box?
No, it's too heavy for me.
Is it heavy enough for you?
Yes, it's heavy enough. But I can do it.
This suitcase is too big to carry.
Let's get a cart.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你能抬起这个箱子吗？
B：不，对我来说太重了。
A：对你来说够重了吗？
B：是的，够重。但我可以。
A：这个行李箱太大，拿不了。
B：我们去推个车吧。

lessons.title: Lesson 10: I Enjoy Listening to Music
lessons.text_en:
What do you enjoy doing in your free time?
I enjoy listening to music.
What kind of music do you like?
I like jazz and classical music.
I prefer reading books.
Reading is a great hobby too.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你空闲时间喜欢做什么？
B：我喜欢听音乐。
A：你喜欢什么类型的音乐？
B：我喜欢爵士乐和古典音乐。
A：我更喜欢读书。
B：阅读也是一个很好的爱好。

lessons.title: Lesson 11: The Window Was Broken by the Storm
lessons.text_en:
What happened to the window?
It was broken by the storm.
When did the storm happen?
Last night. The wind was very strong.
Was anything else damaged?
Yes, some trees were knocked down.
lessons.text_zh:
A：窗户怎么了？
B：被暴风雨打破了。
A：暴风雨什么时候来的？
B：昨晚。风很大。
A：还有其他东西受损吗？
B：是的，一些树被吹倒了。

lessons.title: Lesson 12: He Asked Me Where I Lived
lessons.text_en:
What did the police officer ask you?
He asked me where I lived.
What did you tell him?
I told him I lived on Oak Street.
Did he ask for your ID?
Yes, he asked to see my driver's license.
lessons.text_zh:
A：警察问了你什么？
B：他问我住在哪里。
A：你告诉他什么了？
B：我告诉他我住在橡树街。
A：他要你的身份证了吗？
B：是的，他要看我的驾照。

lessons.title: Lesson 13: The Food Is Being Prepared
lessons.text_en:
Is the food ready?
Not yet. It's being prepared now.
How long will it take?
The chef is cooking it right now.
What is being served tonight?
Grilled salmon with vegetables.
lessons.text_zh:
A：食物准备好了吗？
B：还没有。正在准备中。
A：需要多久？
B：厨师正在做。
A：今晚供应什么？
B：烤三文鱼配蔬菜。

lessons.title: Lesson 14: I Wish I Had Studied More
lessons.text_en:
You look upset.
I wish I had studied more for the test.
Did you not do well?
No, I failed.
I'm sorry. You can take it again.
I know. I'll prepare better next time.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你看起来很沮丧。
B：我真希望我为考试多学了一些。
A：你没考好吗？
B：不，我没通过。
A：很遗憾。你可以再考一次。
B：我知道。下次我会准备得更好。

lessons.title: Lesson 15: He Has Been Working Here for Five Years
lessons.text_en:
How long has Tom been working here?
He has been working here for five years.
Does he like it?
Yes, he loves his job.
What does he do exactly?
He's a software engineer.
lessons.text_zh:
A：汤姆在这里工作多久了？
B：他在这里已经工作五年了。
A：他喜欢吗？
B：是的，他热爱他的工作。
A：他具体做什么？
B：他是一名软件工程师。

lessons.title: Lesson 16: It Must Have Been Expensive
lessons.text_en:
Look at this painting.
It must have been very expensive.
It was. It cost over ten thousand dollars.
Who bought it?
A wealthy collector.
I wish I could afford something like that.
lessons.text_zh:
A：看这幅画。
B：一定很贵。
A：是的。花费超过一万美元。
B：谁买了？
A：一位富有的收藏家。
B：真希望我也买得起这样的东西。

lessons.title: Lesson 17: The Car Was Being Repaired
lessons.text_en:
Where is your car?
It was being repaired at the garage.
What was wrong with it?
The engine had a problem.
Is it fixed now?
Yes, I picked it up this morning.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你的车在哪里？
B：正在修理厂修理。
A：出了什么问题？
B：发动机有问题。
A：现在修好了吗？
B：是的，我今天早上取回来了。

lessons.title: Lesson 18: She Told Me That She Was Sick
lessons.text_en:
Why wasn't Mary at work today?
She told me that she was sick.
Did she say what was wrong?
She said she had a bad cold.
I hope she gets better soon.
Me too. I'll send her a get-well message.
lessons.text_zh:
A：玛丽今天为什么没上班？
B：她告诉我她生病了。
A：她说了哪里不舒服吗？
B：她说她得了重感冒。
A：希望她早日康复。
B：我也是。我会给她发慰问信息。

lessons.title: Lesson 19: If I Were Rich, I Would Travel the World
lessons.text_en:
What would you do if you were rich?
If I were rich, I would travel the world.
Where would you go first?
I would go to the Maldives.
That's a beautiful place.
Yes, I've seen pictures. It looks like paradise.
lessons.text_zh:
A：如果你有钱，你会做什么？
B：如果我有钱，我会环游世界。
A：你会先去哪里？
B：我会去马尔代夫。
A：那是个美丽的地方。
B：是的，我看过照片。看起来像天堂。

lessons.title: Lesson 20: The Book Was Written in 1998
lessons.text_en:
When was this book written?
It was written in 1998.
Who wrote it?
It was written by a famous author.
Has it been translated into other languages?
Yes, it has been translated into twenty languages.
lessons.text_zh:
A：这本书是什么时候写的？
B：写于1998年。
A：谁写的？
B：由一位著名作家写的。
A：它被翻译成其他语言了吗？
B：是的，已经翻译成二十种语言了。

lessons.title: Lesson 21: You Shouldn't Have Said That
lessons.text_en:
You shouldn't have said that to her.
I know. It was a mistake.
She looked really hurt.
I'll apologize to her.
That would be the right thing to do.
I hope she forgives me.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你不应该那样对她说的。
B：我知道。那是个错误。
A：她看起来真的很受伤。
B：我会向她道歉的。
A：那样做是对的。
B：希望她能原谅我。

lessons.title: Lesson 22: I've Been Thinking About You
lessons.text_en:
You look lost in thought.
I've been thinking about you.
Really? What about?
I was just remembering our trip together.
That was such a good time!
Yes, we should do it again.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你看起来在沉思。
B：我一直在想你。
A：真的吗？想什么？
B：我只是在回忆我们一起的旅行。
A：那段时光太美好了！
B：是的，我们应该再去一次。

lessons.title: Lesson 23: The Party Will Be Held on Saturday
lessons.text_en:
When will the party be held?
It will be held on Saturday.
Where will it be held?
It will be held at the community center.
Will food be served?
Yes, dinner will be served at seven.
lessons.text_zh:
A：派对什么时候举办？
B：星期六举办。
A：在哪里举办？
B：在社区中心举办。
A：有食物供应吗？
B：是的，七点供应晚餐。

lessons.title: Lesson 24: I Wish I Could Sing Better
lessons.text_en:
I wish I could sing better.
You're not that bad!
But I want to be really good.
Practice makes perfect.
How often should I practice?
At least thirty minutes every day.
lessons.text_zh:
A：我希望我能唱得更好。
B：你唱得没那么差！
A：但我想唱得非常好。
B：熟能生巧。
A：我应该多久练习一次？
B：每天至少三十分钟。

lessons.title: Lesson 25: All the Tickets Have Been Sold
lessons.text_en:
Can I buy two tickets for the concert?
I'm sorry, all the tickets have been sold.
Sold out? Already?
Yes, they were sold within two hours.
That's disappointing.
You can try the next concert in December.
lessons.text_zh:
A：我能买两张音乐会的票吗？
B：对不起，所有的票都卖完了。
A：售罄了？这么快？
B：是的，两小时内就卖完了。
A：真令人失望。
B：你可以试试十二月的下一场音乐会。

lessons.title: Lesson 26: He Might Have Forgotten
lessons.text_en:
Tom isn't here yet.
He might have forgotten about the meeting.
Did you remind him?
Yes, I sent him an email this morning.
Maybe his phone is off.
I'll try calling him again.
lessons.text_zh:
A：汤姆还没到。
B：他可能忘记会议了。
A：你提醒他了吗？
B：是的，我今天早上给他发了邮件。
A：也许他手机关机了。
B：我再打给他试试。

lessons.title: Lesson 27: It Is Said That He Is a Genius
lessons.text_en:
Have you heard about the new professor?
Yes, it is said that he is a genius.
Is he really that smart?
People say he discovered a new formula.
I would like to meet him.
Maybe you can attend his lecture.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你听说那位新教授了吗？
B：是的，据说他是个天才。
A：他真的那么聪明吗？
B：人们说他发现了一个新公式。
A：我想见见他。
B：也许你可以去听他的讲座。

lessons.title: Lesson 28: I'm Not Used to Driving on the Left
lessons.text_en:
How are you liking it here in the UK?
It's great, but I'm not used to driving on the left.
That takes time to adjust.
I almost went the wrong way today!
Just remember to stay on the left side.
I'll get used to it eventually.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你在英国过得怎么样？
B：很好，但我不习惯靠左行驶。
A：那需要时间适应。
B：我今天差点开错方向！
A：只要记住靠左行驶就行。
B：最终我会习惯的。

lessons.title: Lesson 29: The Letter Was Sent Yesterday
lessons.text_en:
Was the letter sent?
Yes, it was sent yesterday.
Was it sent by regular mail?
No, it was sent by express delivery.
When will it arrive?
It should arrive by Wednesday.
lessons.text_zh:
A：信寄出去了吗？
B：是的，昨天寄出的。
A：是平邮寄的吗？
B：不，是快递寄的。
A：什么时候能到？
B：应该周三前到。

lessons.title: Lesson 30: She Said She Would Call Me Back
lessons.text_en:
Did you speak to the manager?
Yes, I did.
What did she say?
She said she would call me back.
When did she say she would call?
She said she would call this afternoon.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你和经理说话了吗？
B：是的，说了。
A：她说什么？
B：她说她会给我回电话。
A：她说什么时候打？
B：她说今天下午会打。

lessons.title: Lesson 31: This Bridge Was Built a Century Ago
lessons.text_en:
This bridge looks very old.
Yes, it was built a century ago.
Who built it?
It was built by a famous engineer.
Is it still safe to use?
Yes, it's been maintained very well.
lessons.text_zh:
A：这座桥看起来很旧。
B：是的，是一个世纪前建的。
A：谁建造的？
B：由一位著名工程师建造的。
A：现在还安全吗？
B：是的，维护得很好。

lessons.title: Lesson 32: I'd Rather Not Talk About It
lessons.text_en:
What happened at the meeting?
I'd rather not talk about it.
Was it that bad?
Let's just say it didn't go well.
I'm sorry to hear that.
Maybe we can discuss it another time.
lessons.text_zh:
A：会议上发生了什么？
B：我宁愿不谈这个。
A：有那么糟糕吗？
B：只能说进展不顺利。
A：听你这么说我很遗憾。
B：也许我们改天再聊。

lessons.title: Lesson 33: The Museum Can Be Visited for Free
lessons.text_en:
How much is the museum entrance fee?
It can be visited for free.
Really? That's great news!
Yes, it's free every Sunday.
Are all exhibits free too?
Most of them, except the special exhibition.
lessons.text_zh:
A：博物馆门票多少钱？
B：可以免费参观。
A：真的吗？太好了！
B：是的，每周日免费。
A：所有展览都免费吗？
B：大部分是，特展除外。

lessons.title: Lesson 34: If I Had Known, I Wouldn't Have Gone
lessons.text_en:
How was the party last night?
Terrible. If I had known, I wouldn't have gone.
What happened?
The music was too loud and the food was bad.
That doesn't sound fun.
I left after thirty minutes.
lessons.text_zh:
A：昨晚的派对怎么样？
B：太糟了。如果早知道，我就不去了。
A：怎么了？
B：音乐太吵，食物也很难吃。
A：听起来不好玩。
B：我三十分钟后就走了。

lessons.title: Lesson 35: The Window Needs to Be Cleaned
lessons.text_en:
The window is very dirty.
Yes, it needs to be cleaned.
When was it last cleaned?
I think it was cleaned two months ago.
I'll clean it this weekend.
I'll help you. It's a big job.
lessons.text_zh:
A：窗户很脏。
B：是的，需要清洗。
A：上次是什么时候洗的？
B：我想是两个月前。
A：我这个周末来洗。
B：我帮你。这是个大工程。

lessons.title: Lesson 36: He Asked If I Could Help Him
lessons.text_en:
What did your neighbor want?
He asked if I could help him move.
Did you agree?
Yes, I said I would help him on Saturday.
That's very kind of you.
He helped me last year, so I'm returning the favor.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你的邻居想要什么？
B：他问我能不能帮他搬家。
A：你同意了吗？
B：是的，我说周六帮他。
A：你真好。
B：他去年帮过我，所以我在还人情。

lessons.title: Lesson 37: It Hasn't Been Decided Yet
lessons.text_en:
Has the date been decided?
No, it hasn't been decided yet.
When will it be decided?
It will be decided at the next meeting.
Please let me know when you know.
I'll update you as soon as possible.
lessons.text_zh:
A：日期定了吗？
B：不，还没定。
A：什么时候会确定？
B：下次会议上会确定。
A：知道后请告诉我。
B：我会尽快通知你。

lessons.title: Lesson 38: I Wish I Hadn't Said That
lessons.text_en:
You look sad.
I wish I hadn't said that to her.
What did you say?
I said something I didn't mean.
You should apologize.
I already did. I hope she accepts.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你看起来很难过。
B：我真希望我没有对她说那些话。
A：你说了什么？
B：我说了一些并非我本意的话。
A：你应该道歉。
B：我已经道了歉。希望她能接受。

lessons.title: Lesson 39: The Project Will Be Finished By Friday
lessons.text_en:
When will the project be finished?
It will be finished by Friday.
Is that a promise?
Yes, we're working on it right now.
Who will present it?
It will be presented by the team leader.
lessons.text_zh:
A：项目什么时候完成？
B：周五前完成。
A：这是承诺吗？
B：是的，我们现在正在做。
A：谁会做报告？
B：将由组长做报告。

lessons.title: Lesson 40: You Could Have Called Me
lessons.text_en:
You could have called me last night.
I'm sorry. It was very late.
I was worried about you.
I didn't want to wake you up.
I don't mind. Next time, please call.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你昨晚本可以给我打电话的。
B：对不起。太晚了。
A：我很担心你。
B：我不想吵醒你。
A：我不介意。下次请打给我。

lessons.title: Lesson 41: The Soup Is Being Heated
lessons.text_en:
Is the soup ready?
It's being heated right now.
How long will it take?
Just a few more minutes.
It smells wonderful.
It's my grandmother's recipe.
lessons.text_zh:
A：汤好了吗？
B：正在加热。
A：还需要多久？
B：再几分钟就好。
A：闻起来真香。
B：这是我祖母的配方。

lessons.title: Lesson 42: He Said That He Was Sorry
lessons.text_en:
Did Tom apologize?
Yes, he said that he was sorry.
Did he explain why he was late?
He said his car broke down.
Do you believe him?
Yes, I think he was telling the truth.
lessons.text_zh:
A：汤姆道歉了吗？
B：是的，他说他很抱歉。
A：他解释为什么迟到了吗？
B：他说他的车坏了。
A：你相信他吗？
B：是的，我觉得他说的是真话。

lessons.title: Lesson 43: I Wish It Would Stop Raining
lessons.text_en:
It's been raining all day.
I wish it would stop raining.
I wanted to go for a walk.
Maybe we can go tomorrow.
I hope the weather clears up.
The forecast says it will be sunny tomorrow.
lessons.text_zh:
A：下了一整天的雨。
B：真希望雨能停。
A：我本来想去散步的。
B：也许我们明天可以去。
A：希望天气放晴。
B：预报说明天会是晴天。

lessons.title: Lesson 44: The Application Must Be Submitted by Friday
lessons.text_en:
When does the application need to be submitted?
It must be submitted by Friday.
What happens if I miss the deadline?
Then your application won't be considered.
I should submit it early then.
Yes, don't wait until the last minute.
lessons.text_zh:
A：申请需要什么时候提交？
B：必须在周五前提交。
A：如果错过了截止日期怎么办？
B：那你的申请就不会被考虑了。
A：那我应该早点提交。
B：是的，不要等到最后一刻。

lessons.title: Lesson 45: She Wondered If He Would Come
lessons.text_en:
Was Mary at the party?
No, she wasn't sure if she would come.
Did she tell you why?
She wondered if John would be there.
I see. They had an argument.
That explains it.
lessons.text_zh:
A：玛丽在派对上吗？
B：不，她不确自己会不会来。
A：她告诉你原因了吗？
B：她在想约翰会不会在那里。
A：我明白了。他们吵架了。
B：这就解释通了。

lessons.title: Lesson 46: My Wallet Was Stolen
lessons.text_en:
What happened?
My wallet was stolen on the bus.
Did you see the thief?
No, I didn't notice until I got off.
You should report it to the police.
I already did. I hope they catch him.
lessons.text_zh:
A：怎么了？
B：我的钱包在公交车上被偷了。
A：你看到小偷了吗？
B：没有，我下车时才发现。
A：你应该报警。
B：我已经报了。希望他们能抓到他。

lessons.title: Lesson 47: I Should Have Listened to You
lessons.text_en:
You were right. I should have listened to you.
What happened?
I invested in that company and lost money.
I'm sorry to hear that.
You warned me, but I didn't listen.
It's a lesson learned.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你是对的。我本应该听你的。
B：怎么了？
A：我投资了那家公司，亏了钱。
B：听你这么说我很遗憾。
A：你警告过我，但我没听。
B：这是一个教训。

lessons.title: Lesson 48: It Can Be Seen From Miles Away
lessons.text_en:
Can you see the mountain from here?
Yes, it can be seen from miles away.
How tall is it?
It's over 4,000 meters tall.
Have you ever climbed it?
No, but I hope to someday.
lessons.text_zh:
A：从这里能看到那座山吗？
B：是的，几英里外就能看到。
A：它有多高？
B：超过4000米。
A：你爬过吗？
B：没有，但希望有一天能爬。

lessons.title: Lesson 49: If I Were You, I Would Take the Job
lessons.text_en:
I'm not sure if I should accept the job offer.
If I were you, I would take it.
But the salary isn't very high.
Think about the experience you'll gain.
That's a good point.
You can always look for a better job later.
lessons.text_zh:
A：我不确定是否该接受这份工作。
B：如果我是你，我会接受。
A：但薪水不是很高。
B：想想你能获得的经验。
A：说得有道理。
B：你以后总能找到更好的工作。

lessons.title: Lesson 50: It Has Been a Wonderful Journey
lessons.text_en:
How do you feel about finishing the course?
It has been a wonderful journey.
What was the best part?
Meeting all the new friends.
Did you learn a lot?
Yes, I've learned more than I expected.
lessons.text_zh:
A：完成课程感觉如何？
B：这是一段美好的旅程。
A：最好的部分是什么？
B：认识了所有的新朋友。
A：你学到了很多吗？
B：是的，我学到的比预期的多。

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Had I Known, I Would Have Stayed
lessons.text_en:
Had I known it was going to rain, I would have stayed home.
I wish I had brought my umbrella.
If only I had checked the weather forecast.
We should have been better prepared.
Well, at least we're together.
That's true. That makes everything better.
lessons.text_zh:
A：要是我早知道要下雨，我就待在家里了。
B：我真希望我带了雨伞。
A：要是我查了天气预报就好了。
B：我们本应该准备得更好的。
A：嗯，至少我们在一起。
B：没错。这让一切都更好了。

lessons.title: Lesson 2: It's Essential That He Be There
lessons.text_en:
It's essential that he be there on time.
I'll make sure he arrives early.
It's important that everyone understand the rules.
I'll explain them clearly.
I suggest that she take the train.
That's a good idea. Traffic is terrible.
lessons.text_zh:
A：他必须准时到场，这一点至关重要。
B：我会确保他早到。
A：每个人都必须理解规则，这一点很重要。
B：我会清楚解释。
A：我建议她坐火车。
B：好主意。交通太糟了。

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Were I You, I Would Accept
lessons.text_en:
Were I you, I would accept the job offer.
Really? You think so?
Absolutely. If I were in your shoes, I wouldn't hesitate.
But what if it doesn't work out?
Then you'll find something else. Nothing ventured, nothing gained.
You're right. I'll take it.
lessons.text_zh:
A：如果我是你，我会接受那份工作邀请。
B：真的吗？你这么认为？
A：当然。如果我处在你的位置，我不会犹豫。
B：但如果结果不好呢？
A：那你会找到别的。不入虎穴，焉得虎子。
B：你说得对。我接受。

lessons.title: Lesson 4: No Sooner Had I Left
lessons.text_en:
No sooner had I left the house than it started raining.
What bad luck!
Not only did it rain, but I also forgot my phone.
Never have I had such a bad day!
Barely had I arrived at work when my boss called a meeting.
Some days are like that.
lessons.text_zh:
A：我刚离开家，就开始下雨了。
B：真倒霉！
A：不仅下雨了，我还忘了手机。
B：我从来没有过这么糟糕的一天！
A：我刚刚到公司，老板就召集开会。
B：有时候就是这样。

lessons.title: Lesson 5: The More You Practice, the Better You Get
lessons.text_en:
The more you practice, the better you get.
That's true for everything in life.
The harder I study, the more I realize I don't know.
That's a sign of wisdom!
The sooner we start, the sooner we'll finish.
Let's begin right now then.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你练习得越多，就做得越好。
B：生活中的一切都是这样。
A：我学习得越努力，就越意识到我不知道的越多。
B：这是智慧的标志！
A：我们越早开始，就越早完成。
B：那我们现在就开始吧。

lessons.title: Lesson 6: I Would Rather You Didn't
lessons.text_en:
Do you mind if I open the window?
I would rather you didn't. It's cold outside.
I'd rather stay home tonight than go out.
Me too. Let's watch a movie.
Would you rather have pizza or Chinese food?
I'd rather have Chinese food tonight.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你介意我开窗吗？
B：我宁愿你不要开。外面很冷。
A：今晚我宁愿待在家里也不愿出去。
B：我也是。我们看电影吧。
A：你更想吃披萨还是中餐？
B：今晚我更想吃中餐。

lessons.title: Lesson 7: It's Been a Long Time Since I've Seen You
lessons.text_en:
It's been a long time since I've seen you!
I know! It must be at least two years.
You haven't changed a bit!
Neither have you! You look great.
How have you been?
I've been doing really well, thanks.
lessons.text_zh:
A：好久不见！
B：我知道！至少两年了。
A：你一点都没变！
B：你也是！你看起来很好。
A：你过得怎么样？
B：我一直很好，谢谢。

lessons.title: Lesson 8: That's the Best Movie I've Ever Seen
lessons.text_en:
That's the best movie I've ever seen.
I agree. The acting was incredible.
It was the most moving story I've ever heard.
And the music was beautiful.
I've never been so affected by a film before.
Let's watch it again sometime.
lessons.text_zh:
A：这是我见过的最好的电影。
B：我同意。表演太棒了。
A：这是我听过的最感人的故事。
B：音乐也很美。
A：我从来没有被一部电影这么打动过。
B：我们什么时候再看一次吧。

lessons.title: Lesson 9: What Would You Have Done?
lessons.text_en:
What would you have done if you were me?
I would have told the truth from the beginning.
But I was afraid of hurting their feelings.
Honesty is always the best policy.
I guess you're right. I should have been honest.
It's never too late to do the right thing.
lessons.text_zh:
A：如果你是我，你会怎么做？
B：我会从一开始就说实话。
A：但我怕伤害他们的感情。
B：诚实总是上策。
A：我想你说得对。我应该诚实的。
B：做正确的事永远不会太晚。

lessons.title: Lesson 10: Little Did I Know
lessons.text_en:
Little did I know that my life was about to change.
Sometimes the best things are unexpected.
Never in my wildest dreams did I imagine this.
Life has a way of surprising us.
Only later did I realize how lucky I was.
Everything happens for a reason.
lessons.text_zh:
A：我一点都不知道我的生活即将改变。
B：有时候最好的事情是意想不到的。
A：我做梦都没想到。
B：生活总有办法给我们惊喜。
A：后来我才意识到我有多幸运。
B：一切皆有原因。

lessons.title: Lesson 11: Not Until Now Have I Understood
lessons.text_en:
Not until now have I understood what you meant.
It took you long enough!
I was being stubborn. I admit it.
The important thing is that you understand now.
You're very patient with me.
That's what friends are for.
lessons.text_zh:
A：直到现在我才明白你的意思。
B：你花了够久了！
A：我之前太固执了。我承认。
B：重要的是你现在明白了。
A：你对我很有耐心。
B：朋友就是这样的。

lessons.title: Lesson 12: Were It Not for Your Help
lessons.text_en:
Were it not for your help, I would have failed.
Don't mention it. I was happy to help.
I truly appreciate everything you did.
You would have done the same for me.
Let me buy you dinner as a thank you.
That's not necessary, but I won't say no!
lessons.text_zh:
A：如果不是你的帮助，我就失败了。
B：别提了。我很高兴能帮忙。
A：我真的很感激你所做的一切。
B：你也会为我做同样的事。
A：我请你吃晚饭表示感谢。
B：不用了，不过我不会拒绝！

lessons.title: Lesson 13: On No Account Should You Open the Door
lessons.text_en:
On no account should you open the door to strangers.
I know, Mom. I'm not a child anymore.
I'm just worried about your safety.
I'll be careful, I promise.
And call me if anything happens.
I will. Don't worry.
lessons.text_zh:
A：无论如何都不要给陌生人开门。
B：我知道，妈妈。我不再是小孩子了。
A：我只是担心你的安全。
B：我会小心的，我保证。
A：有什么事就打电话给我。
B：我会的。别担心。

lessons.title: Lesson 14: I Take It That You Agree
lessons.text_en:
I take it that you agree with the plan?
Yes, I think it's a good idea.
I take it that everyone is on board?
Yes, we all support it.
Then let's move forward with it.
I'll start working on it right away.
lessons.text_zh:
A：这么说你同意这个计划了？
B：是的，我认为这是个好主意。
A：这么说大家都同意了？
B：是的，我们都支持。
A：那我们就推进吧。
B：我马上开始做。

lessons.title: Lesson 15: Only After the Fact Did I Realize
lessons.text_en:
Only after the fact did I realize my mistake.
What happened?
I sent the email to the wrong person.
That could be embarrassing.
It was. I had to apologize to everyone.
Lesson learned, I hope.
lessons.text_zh:
A：事后我才意识到我的错误。
B：怎么了？
A：我把邮件发错人了。
B：那可能很尴尬。
A：是的。我不得不向所有人道歉。
B：希望这是教训。

lessons.title: Lesson 16: The Fact That He Left Surprised Everyone
lessons.text_en:
The fact that he left surprised everyone.
I know. Nobody saw it coming.
Did he give any reason?
He said he needed a change.
I hope he's doing well.
I'm sure he is.
lessons.text_zh:
A：他离开了这件事让所有人惊讶。
B：我知道。没人预料到。
A：他给出理由了吗？
B：他说他需要改变。
A：希望他过得很好。
B：我相信他会的。

lessons.title: Lesson 17: I'd Rather You Told Me the Truth
lessons.text_en:
I'd rather you told me the truth from the start.
I'm sorry I lied to you.
Why didn't you tell me?
I was afraid you'd be angry.
I'm more angry that you lied.
I won't do it again. I promise.
lessons.text_zh:
A：我宁愿你从一开始就告诉我真相。
B：对不起，我对你撒谎了。
A：你为什么没告诉我？
B：我怕你生气。
A：我更生气的是你撒谎。
B：我不会再这样了。我保证。

lessons.title: Lesson 18: Should You Have Any Questions, Let Me Know
lessons.text_en:
Should you have any questions, please let me know.
Thank you. I'll read through the document first.
Take your time. There's no rush.
If something is unclear, I'll ask.
I'll be in my office all afternoon.
Great. I appreciate your help.
lessons.text_zh:
A：如有任何问题，请告诉我。
B：谢谢。我先通读一遍文件。
A：慢慢来，不着急。
B：如果有不清楚的地方，我会问。
A：我整个下午都在办公室。
B：太好了。谢谢你的帮助。

lessons.title: Lesson 19: Not Once Did He Call
lessons.text_en:
Not once did he call while I was away.
That's not very thoughtful of him.
I expected at least a message.
Maybe he was busy.
Too busy to send a text?
Some people are just like that.
lessons.text_zh:
A：我在外期间他一次都没打电话。
B：他真是不够体贴。
A：我至少期待一条信息。
B：也许他太忙了。
A：忙到连发条短信都没空？
B：有些人就是那样。

lessons.title: Lesson 20: It Is Imperative That We Act Now
lessons.text_en:
It is imperative that we act now.
I agree. We can't afford to wait.
The situation is getting worse.
What do you suggest?
We need to implement the new system immediately.
I'll start the process today.
lessons.text_zh:
A：我们现在必须采取行动。
B：我同意。我们不能等了。
A：情况越来越糟了。
B：你有什么建议？
A：我们需要立即实施新系统。
B：我今天就开始流程。

lessons.title: Lesson 21: Under No Circumstances Should You Panic
lessons.text_en:
Under no circumstances should you panic.
But what if something goes wrong?
Staying calm is the most important thing.
You're right. Panicking doesn't help.
Take a deep breath and think.
I'll try to keep my cool.
lessons.text_zh:
A：在任何情况下都不要惊慌。
B：但如果出了什么问题呢？
A：保持冷静是最重要的。
B：你说得对。惊慌没有用。
A：深呼吸，思考一下。
B：我会尽量保持冷静。

lessons.title: Lesson 22: I Wish You Wouldn't Interrupt Me
lessons.text_en:
I wish you wouldn't interrupt me when I'm speaking.
Sorry, I didn't realize I was doing it.
It happens quite often.
I'll try to be more aware.
Thank you. I appreciate that.
Please feel free to point it out if I do it again.
lessons.text_zh:
A：我希望你在我说话时不要打断我。
B：抱歉，我没意识到。
A：这种情况经常发生。
B：我会多注意的。
A：谢谢。我很感激。
B：如果我又这样，请随时指出。

lessons.title: Lesson 23: So Successful Was the Event
lessons.text_en:
So successful was the event that they're planning another one.
That's wonderful news!
So many people attended that it exceeded all expectations.
How many people came?
Over five hundred people showed up.
That's amazing!
lessons.text_zh:
A：活动如此成功，以至于他们正在计划下一场。
B：太好了！
A：来了这么多人，超出了所有人的预期。
B：来了多少人？
A：超过五百人参加了。
B：太惊人了！

lessons.title: Lesson 24: It's High Time We Left
lessons.text_en:
It's high time we left for the airport.
What time is our flight?
Boarding starts at 3 PM.
We still have two hours.
Better to be early than late.
OK, I'll grab my coat.
lessons.text_zh:
A：我们该去机场了。
B：我们的航班几点？
A：下午三点开始登机。
B：我们还有两个小时。
A：早到总比迟到好。
B：好的，我拿外套。

lessons.title: Lesson 25: Were It Possible, I Would Visit
lessons.text_en:
Were it possible, I would visit every country in the world.
That would be an incredible journey.
I've always dreamed of traveling extensively.
What's stopping you?
Time and money, as always.
Start with one country and go from there.
lessons.text_zh:
A：如果可能的话，我会去世界上每个国家。
B：那将是一段不可思议的旅程。
A：我一直梦想着广泛旅行。
B：什么阻止了你？
A：时间和金钱，一如既往。
B：先从一个国家开始，然后慢慢来。

lessons.title: Lesson 26: It Wasn't Until Midnight That He Came Home
lessons.text_en:
It wasn't until midnight that he came home.
Were you worried?
Of course I was! He didn't call or text.
Did he explain why he was late?
He said he lost track of time.
At least he's home safe.
lessons.text_zh:
A：他直到午夜才回家。
B：你担心了吗？
A：当然担心了！他既没打电话也没发短信。
B：他解释为什么晚了吗？
A：他说他忘了时间。
B：至少他安全到家了。

lessons.title: Lesson 27: I Insist That He Be Present
lessons.text_en:
I insist that he be present at the meeting.
I'll make sure he's there.
It's crucial that everyone hear this.
What's the topic?
The future direction of our company.
I understand. I'll personally invite him.
lessons.text_zh:
A：我坚持他必须出席会议。
B：我会确保他到场。
A：每个人都必须听到这个很重要。
B：什么主题？
A：我们公司未来的方向。
B：明白了。我会亲自邀请他。

lessons.title: Lesson 28: Never Have I Felt So Alive
lessons.text_en:
Never have I felt so alive as when I'm on stage.
Performing must be an amazing feeling.
It's like flying. The energy from the crowd...
I can only imagine.
You should try it sometime!
I'm too shy to perform in front of people.
lessons.text_zh:
A：我从未像站在舞台上时感觉那么充满活力。
B：表演一定是种很棒的体验。
A：就像飞翔一样。观众的能量……
B：我只能在心里想象。
A：你应该找个机会试试！
B：我太害羞了，不敢在人群前表演。

lessons.title: Lesson 29: But for Your Advice, I Would Have Quit
lessons.text_en:
But for your advice, I would have quit my job.
I'm glad I could help.
You gave me a different perspective.
Sometimes we just need someone to talk to.
Things are much better now.
I'm happy to hear that.
lessons.text_zh:
A：要不是你的建议，我就辞职了。
B：很高兴我能帮忙。
A：你给了我不一样的视角。
B：有时候我们只是需要找人说说话。
A：现在情况好多了。
B：很高兴听到这个。

lessons.title: Lesson 30: Rarely Does She Complain
lessons.text_en:
Rarely does she complain about anything.
She's a very patient person.
I admire that quality about her.
She always looks on the bright side.
How does she stay so positive?
She practices gratitude every day.
lessons.text_zh:
A：她很少抱怨任何事情。
B：她是一个很有耐心的人。
A：我很欣赏她这个品质。
B：她总是往好的方面看。
A：她怎么能保持这么积极？
B：她每天都练习感恩。

lessons.title: Lesson 31: I'd Prefer It If You Didn't Smoke
lessons.text_en:
I'd prefer it if you didn't smoke in the house.
Of course. I'll step outside.
Thank you. The smell stays for hours.
I understand. It's not good for health anyway.
Have you tried quitting?
I've tried many times. It's not easy.
lessons.text_zh:
A：我更希望你不要在屋子里抽烟。
B：当然。我出去抽。
A：谢谢。烟味会残留好几个小时。
B：我理解。而且对健康也不好。
A：你试过戒烟吗？
B：试过很多次。不容易。

lessons.title: Lesson 32: Such Was Her Kindness That She Helped Everyone
lessons.text_en:
Such was her kindness that she helped everyone in need.
She was truly a remarkable person.
She never expected anything in return.
That's the purest form of kindness.
I try to be more like her.
The world would be better with more people like her.
lessons.text_zh:
A：她如此善良，帮助了每一个需要帮助的人。
B：她真是一个了不起的人。
A：她从不求回报。
B：那是最高尚的善良。
A：我努力向她学习。
B：世界上多一些像她这样的人会更好。

lessons.title: Lesson 33: I Wish They Would Keep the Noise Down
lessons.text_en:
I wish they would keep the noise down.
It's almost midnight. I'll talk to them.
I have an early meeting tomorrow.
I understand. I'll ask them politely.
Thank you. I appreciate it.
No problem. We all need our sleep.
lessons.text_zh:
A：真希望他们能把噪音关小一点。
B：都快午夜了。我去跟他们说。
A：我明天早上有个会。
B：我理解。我会礼貌地跟他们说。
A：谢谢。感激不尽。
B：没问题。我们都需要睡眠。

lessons.title: Lesson 34: It Is Essential That the Report Be Ready
lessons.text_en:
It is essential that the report be ready by Friday.
I'll make sure it's done.
The client is expecting it.
What format should it be in?
PDF format, with charts included.
Understood. I'll prioritize this.
lessons.text_zh:
A：报告必须在周五前准备好。
B：我会确保完成。
A：客户在等着呢。
B：应该用什么格式？
A：PDF格式，包含图表。
B：明白。我会优先处理。

lessons.title: Lesson 35: No Matter How Hard I Try
lessons.text_en:
No matter how hard I try, I can't seem to get it right.
Don't be so hard on yourself.
But I've practiced a hundred times!
Sometimes we need more time to learn.
How did you learn so quickly?
I had a good teacher who was patient.
lessons.text_zh:
A：不管我多努力，似乎总是做不对。
B：别对自己太苛刻了。
A：但我已经练习了一百次了！
B：有时候我们需要更多时间来学习。
A：你怎么学得这么快？
B：我有一个耐心好老师。

lessons.title: Lesson 36: Hardly Had We Sat Down When
lessons.text_en:
Hardly had we sat down when the fire alarm went off.
That must have been scary.
Everyone had to evacuate the building.
Was it a real fire?
No, it was a false alarm.
At least everyone was safe.
lessons.text_zh:
A：我们刚坐下，火警就响了。
B：那一定很吓人。
A：所有人都得疏散大楼。
B：是真的火灾吗？
A：不，是假警报。
B：至少大家安全。

lessons.title: Lesson 37: It's Unacceptable That He Behave Like That
lessons.text_en:
It's unacceptable that he behave like that in public.
I agree. It was very embarrassing.
Someone should talk to him.
I think he doesn't realize how he comes across.
He needs to learn some manners.
I'll have a word with him privately.
lessons.text_zh:
A：他在公共场合那样表现是不可接受的。
B：我同意。非常尴尬。
A：应该有人找他谈谈。
B：我想他没意识到自己给别人留下的印象。
A：他需要学些礼貌。
B：我会私下跟他说说。

lessons.title: Lesson 38: Seldom Do We See Such Talent
lessons.text_en:
Seldom do we see such talent in young performers.
She has a bright future ahead.
Her voice is extraordinary.
She has been training since she was six.
Hard work combined with natural talent.
That's a winning combination.
lessons.text_zh:
A：我们很少在年轻表演者身上看到这样的才华。
B：她前途光明。
A：她的声音非凡。
B：她从六岁就开始训练了。
A：努力加上天赋。
B：这是一个必胜组合。

lessons.title: Lesson 39: I'd Rather Not Have Gone
lessons.text_en:
How was the concert?
I'd rather not have gone.
That bad?
The sound was terrible and it was overcrowded.
That's a shame. You were so excited.
Sometimes expectations don't match reality.
lessons.text_zh:
A：音乐会怎么样？
B：我宁愿没去。
A：有那么糟吗？
B：音响效果很差，人又太多。
A：真可惜。你之前那么期待。
B：有时候期望和现实不符。

lessons.title: Lesson 40: Only by Working Hard Can You Succeed
lessons.text_en:
Only by working hard can you succeed.
That's what my parents always tell me.
They're right. There are no shortcuts.
I know. I've been studying every day.
Keep it up and you'll achieve your goals.
Thank you for the encouragement.
lessons.text_zh:
A：只有通过努力工作才能成功。
B：我父母总是这样告诉我。
A：他们说得对。没有捷径。
B：我知道。我每天都在学习。
A：坚持下去，你会实现目标的。
B：谢谢你的鼓励。

lessons.title: Lesson 41: I Wish You Had Told Me Earlier
lessons.text_en:
I wish you had told me earlier about the problem.
I didn't want to worry you.
Now it's become a bigger issue.
I'm sorry. I should have spoken up.
Next time, please tell me right away.
I will. I've learned my lesson.
lessons.text_zh:
A：我真希望你能早点告诉我这个问。
B：我不想让你担心。
A：现在问题变得更大了。
B：对不起。我本应该说出来的。
A：下次请马上告诉我。
B：我会的。我吸取教训了。

lessons.title: Lesson 42: So Absorbed Was She in Her Book
lessons.text_en:
So absorbed was she in her book that she didn't hear me call.
That must be a really good book.
It's a mystery novel. She couldn't put it down.
I love books like that.
What kind of books do you like?
I prefer biographies.
lessons.text_zh:
A：她如此沉浸在她的书中，以至于没听到我喊她。
B：那一定是一本非常好的书。
A：那是一部悬疑小说。她爱不释手。
B：我喜欢那样的书。
A：你喜欢什么类型的书？
B：我更喜欢传记。

lessons.title: Lesson 43: I Move That the Meeting Be Adjourned
lessons.text_en:
I move that the meeting be adjourned until tomorrow.
I second the motion.
All in favor, say aye.
Aye!
The motion is carried. We'll reconvene at 9 AM tomorrow.
Thank you everyone for your time.
lessons.text_zh:
A：我提议会议暂停，明天继续。
B：我附议。
A：赞成的请说「是」。
所有人：是！
A：动议通过。我们明天早上九点再开会。
B：感谢大家的时间。

lessons.title: Lesson 44: Nowhere Else Can You Find Such Beauty
lessons.text_en:
Nowhere else can you find such natural beauty.
This place is truly breathtaking.
The mountains, the lake, the forest...
It's like a painting come to life.
I could stay here forever.
Let's take a picture to remember this moment.
lessons.text_zh:
A：你在别处找不到如此的自然美景。
B：这个地方真是令人叹为观止。
A：山、湖、森林……
B：就像一幅活过来的画。
A：我可以永远待在这里。
B：我们拍张照片记住这一刻吧。

lessons.title: Lesson 45: I Suggest That We Take a Different Approach
lessons.text_en:
I suggest that we take a different approach to this problem.
What do you have in mind?
Instead of working separately, let's collaborate.
That could be more efficient.
We can each focus on our strengths.
I agree. Let's try it your way.
lessons.text_zh:
A：我建议我们对这个问题采取不同的方法。
B：你有什么想法？
A：与其单独工作，不如合作。
B：这样可能更有效率。
A：我们可以各自发挥优势。
B：我同意。就按你的办法试试。

lessons.title: Lesson 46: The Importance of Education Cannot Be Overstated
lessons.text_en:
The importance of education cannot be overstated.
I couldn't agree more.
It opens doors that nothing else can.
That's why I encourage my children to study hard.
Knowledge is power, as they say.
And it's something no one can take from you.
lessons.text_zh:
A：教育的重要性怎么强调都不为过。
B：我完全同意。
A：它能打开其他任何东西都打不开的门。
B：所以我鼓励我的孩子们努力学习。
A：知识就是力量，常言道。
B：而且这是没人能从你身上夺走的。

lessons.title: Lesson 47: Only When I Lost It Did I Appreciate It
lessons.text_en:
Only when I lost it did I appreciate what I had.
That's often how it works.
I took my health for granted.
We all do, until something happens.
Now I exercise every day and eat well.
That's a valuable lesson to learn.
lessons.text_zh:
A：只有当我失去时，我才懂得珍惜。
B：事情往往是这样。
A：我以前把健康视为理所当然。
B：我们都这样，直到出问题。
A：现在我每天锻炼，吃得很健康。
B：这是宝贵的一课。

lessons.title: Lesson 48: It Is Crucial That the Data Be Accurate
lessons.text_en:
It is crucial that the data be accurate.
I've double-checked everything.
Even small errors can have big consequences.
I understand the importance.
When will the analysis be complete?
By the end of the day.
lessons.text_zh:
A：数据必须准确，这一点至关重要。
B：我已经反复核对过了。
A：即使是小错误也可能导致大后果。
B：我理解其重要性。
A：分析什么时候完成？
B：今天结束前。

lessons.title: Lesson 49: In No Way Am I Blaming You
lessons.text_en:
In no way am I blaming you for what happened.
But I feel responsible.
It was an accident. No one could have predicted it.
Still, I wish I had done things differently.
Learn from it and move on.
You're right. Thank you for being understanding.
lessons.text_zh:
A：我绝不是怪你。
B：但我感觉有责任。
A：那是个意外。没人能预料到。
B：但我还是希望我当时做得不一样。
A：从中学习，继续前行。
B：你说得对。谢谢你这么理解。

lessons.title: Lesson 50: Never in My Life Have I Been So Proud
lessons.text_en:
Never in my life have I been so proud.
Your speech was absolutely inspiring.
Thank you. I was so nervous up there.
You couldn't tell at all. You were amazing.
All those hours of practice paid off.
This is just the beginning of great things for you.
lessons.text_zh:
A：我一生中从未如此自豪过。
B：你的演讲非常鼓舞人心。
A：谢谢。我在台上紧张极了。
B：完全看不出来。你太棒了。
A：那么多小时的练习没有白费。
B：这仅仅是你伟大事业的开始。
